items.title_en: OpenAI Submits S-1 Draft to SEC
items.title_zh: OpenAI 向美SEC提交了S-1草案
items.summary_en: OpenAI has confidentially submitted an S-1 draft to the SEC, a formal step toward an IPO that signals the company is preparing to go public. The move will invite intense investor interest and regulatory scrutiny over governance, valuations, and partnerships that have shaped its rapid growth. Market timing and terms remain unclear, but this frames AI companies as mainstream public-market bets.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 已秘密向美国证监会提交S-1草案，正式迈出上市准备的一步。该行动将引来投资者关注和监管审查，围绕公司治理、估值以及与大公司的合作关系展开讨论。具体时间和条款尚未公布，但标志着AI公司进入公开市场的关键节点。

items.title_en: Surveillance Is Not Safety: A statement on the UK's latest threat to privacy [pdf]
items.title_zh: 监控并非安全：对英国最新隐私威胁的声明
items.summary_en: The statement argues recent UK proposals expand surveillance powers in ways that weaken end-to-end encryption and civil liberties, warning that more monitoring does not equate to greater safety. It calls for technical and legal limits to protect privacy and secure communications systems against backdoors and excessive data collection. The debate has major implications for developers, privacy-preserving services, and cross-border encryption standards.
items.summary_zh: 声明指出英国最新提案扩大监控权限，会削弱端到端加密和公民自由，强调更多监控并不等于更安全。文中呼吁在技术和法律上设限，防止后门与过度数据收集，保护通信隐私。此议题将影响开发者、隐私服务以及跨境加密标准。

items.title_en: Stop the Apple Music app from launching
items.title_zh: 阻止 Apple Music 应用自动启动
items.summary_en: A practical workaround to stop the Music app from auto-launching, reducing background resource use and improving startup times on macOS and iOS. The note provides actionable steps or scripts to decouple the app from system boot and regain control over app lifecycle.
items.summary_zh: 阻止 Apple Music 自动启动的实用方法，能减少后台资源消耗并提升启动速度。文中给出可操作的设置或脚本，让你重新掌控应用的生命周期。

items.title_en: Apple reveals new AI architecture built around Google Gemini models
items.title_zh: 苹果揭示以 Google Gemini 模型为核心的新 AI 架构
items.summary_en: Apple unveils an AI architecture centered on Gemini models, signaling closer integration with Google’s AI stack. The move could influence on-device inference, privacy controls, and cross-platform tooling, shaping the next wave of iOS AI features.
items.summary_zh: 苹果公布以 Gemini 模型为核心的新 AI 架构，预示将更紧密地整合 Google 的 AI 技术栈。此举可能影响设备端推理、隐私控制以及跨平台工具链，并可能塑造未来的 iOS AI 功能。

items.title_en: Siri AI
items.title_zh: Siri AI
items.summary_en: Siri AI signals a renewed push to embed AI across Apple’s software stack, likely emphasizing on-device models and privacy-preserving features. The initiative could redefine voice interactions and the developer ecosystem on Apple platforms.
items.summary_zh: Siri AI 的推进意味着在苹果生态内更广泛地嵌入 AI，可能聚焦于设备端模型和隐私保护。此举或将重塑语音交互方式与开发者生态。

items.title_en: Show HN: Performative-UI – A react component library of design tropes
items.title_zh: Show HN：Performative-UI——一个包含常见设计套路的 React 组件库
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces Performative-UI, a React component library built around common UI design tropes, enabling teams to assemble interfaces using predictable, reusable patterns. It prompts a discussion on the trade-offs between speed, consistency, and accessibility in ‘performative’ UIs, especially for growing apps.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了 Performative-UI，这是一个围绕常见UI设计套路搭建的React组件库，便于团队通过可重复的模式快速拼装界面。它引发关于在追求速度与一致性的同时，如何兼顾无障碍与长期可维护性的讨论。

items.title_en: Switzerland wil have a referendum to cap population at 10M
items.title_zh: 瑞士将就人口上限定为 1000 万举行公投
items.summary_en: Swiss referendum aims to cap population at 10 million, a demographic policy with potential implications for housing, immigration, and public services. The move could test how radical population controls are received in a wealthy, small-country context.
items.summary_zh: 瑞士计划就将人口上限设为 1000 万展开公投，涉及住房、移民与公共服务等议题。这个提案在这个富裕、人口规模较小的国家引发对人口政策与经济社会目标之间权衡的讨论。

items.title_en: MiMo-v2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed: 1T model with 1000 tokens per second
items.title_zh: MiMo-v2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed：1T 参数模型，吞吐 1000 tokens/秒
items.summary_en: MiMo unveils a 1T-parameter model claimed to deliver about 1000 tokens per second. If true, it underscores the industry's push to accelerate large-language-model inference and the trade-offs between speed, cost, and accuracy in real-world deployments.
items.summary_zh: MiMo 宣布推出一个 1T 参数的模型，声称可达到每秒约 1000 个 token 的推理速度。若属实，这凸显了业界在加速大模型推理方面的竞争，以及在实际应用中对速度、成本和准确性的权衡。

items.title_en: A Farmer Donated Land to Turn into a Park. The City Is Building a Data Center
items.title_zh: 农民捐地建公园，城市却在建数据中心
items.summary_en: A farmer donated land intended for a park, but the city is building a massive data center there. The situation highlights tensions between green space preservation and expanding digital infrastructure, with implications for energy use, land zoning, and local communities.
items.summary_zh: 一名农民捐出土地用于公园改造，但市政府却在此地建设数据中心。此事凸显保护绿地与发展数字基础设施之间的矛盾，并对能源使用、土地利用及当地社区产生影响。

items.title_en: AI is slowing down
items.title_zh: AI 发展放缓
items.summary_en: AI progress appears to be decelerating due to diminishing returns and hardware constraints, prompting a shift toward efficiency and specialized AI. The piece suggests a move away from relentless scaling toward sustainable deployment.
items.summary_zh: AI 进展放缓的迹象越来越明显，源于收益递减和硬件约束，促使向高效、专用 AI 转型。报道强调从无节制扩张转向可持续部署的趋势。

items.title_en: xAI is looking more like a datacentre REIT than a frontier lab
items.title_zh: xAI 看起来更像数据中心 REIT，而非前沿实验室
items.summary_en: xAI is evolving into a data-center oriented business model, with recurring revenue and large-scale compute hubs taking precedence over speculative research. The take argues this shift could influence AI startup funding and the pace of genuine innovation.
items.summary_zh: xAI 正在走向以数据中心为核心的商业模式，强调经常性收入与大规模计算中心的作用，优先于投机性研究。此趋势可能改变 AI 初创公司的资金分配与创新节奏。

items.title_en: Apple WWDC 2026
items.title_zh: 苹果 WWDC 2026 直播
items.summary_en: Apple announces a WWDC 2026 livestream, typically used to unveil OS updates and developer tools. Engineers should watch for API changes, new frameworks, and potential performance or security improvements.
items.summary_zh: 苹果宣布将举行 WWDC 2026 直播，通常是发布操作系统更新和开发工具的时刻。工程师与开发者应关注 API 变更、新框架以及性能或安全改进等内容。

items.title_en: Massachusetts bans sale of precise location data in new privacy rights bill
items.title_zh: 马萨诸塞州通过新隐私法禁止出售精确定位数据
items.summary_en: Massachusetts adopts a privacy bill banning the sale of precise location data, extending protections for consumers. The law could reshape ad-tech practices, data brokerage, and app telemetry that relies on fine-grained geolocation.
items.summary_zh: 马萨诸塞州通过的新隐私法禁止出售精确定位数据，扩展了对消费者的保护。这将影响广告技术、数据经纪和依赖精准地理位置的应用，推动更透明的数据处理。

items.title_en: Anti-social: It's fads, not friends, which now dominate social media feeds
items.title_zh: 反社交：现在主导社媒的是潮流而非朋友
items.summary_en: Recent coverage argues that social feeds are increasingly driven by fads rather than genuine friendships, shaping what content goes viral and how users engage. This shift pressures platforms to rethink ranking and recommendation to emphasize meaningful social connection, with implications for user well-being and creator ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 最新报道指出，社交媒体的信息流正被潮流化内容主导，而非真正的朋友关系，影响内容传播与用户互动模式。这一变化给平台的排序与推荐算法带来压力，需重新强调有意义的社交连接，并对用户福祉与创作者生态造成深远影响。

items.title_en: Apple Core AI Framework
items.title_zh: Apple Core AI 框架
items.summary_en: Apple's Core AI framework provides a unified API for running and integrating on-device machine learning and generative models, emphasizing performance and privacy. It aims to simplify model deployment across Apple platforms with optimizations for hardware like Apple silicon and tooling for developers to leverage local inference. The framework signals Apple's push to make advanced AI features native while keeping data on-device.
items.summary_zh: Apple 的 Core AI 框架为在设备上运行和集成机器学习及生成式模型提供统一接口，重点在性能与隐私。它简化了模型在 Apple 平台上的部署，针对 Apple 芯片做出优化并为开发者提供本地推理的工具。该框架表明 Apple 力求将高级 AI 功能原生化，同时尽量在设备端保留数据。

items.title_en: FrontierCode
items.title_zh: FrontierCode
items.summary_en: FrontierCode presents an initiative focused on advancing the next generation of code-centric models and tooling. It positions itself around improving code model capabilities at the frontier of research and deployment.
items.summary_zh: FrontierCode 是一个致力于推动下一代代码模型与工具的计划，旨在提升代码生成与理解方面的前沿能力。

items.title_en: Why are cells small?
items.title_zh: 细胞为什么要小
items.summary_en: The piece explains physical and energetic limits that keep cells small, focusing on surface-to-volume ratio and nutrient diffusion. It links these constraints to cellular organization and efficiency trade-offs in biology.
items.summary_zh: 本文解释限制细胞大小的物理与能量约束，聚焦表面积与体积比对养分交换的影响以及扩散过程。将这些约束放在细胞组织与代谢效率的更大框架中，说明生物在效率与复杂性之间的取舍。

items.title_en: EU-banned pesticides found in rice, tea and spices
items.title_zh: 在米、茶和香料中发现欧盟禁用农药
items.summary_en: EU-banned pesticides were detected in staple foods like rice, tea, and spices, pointing to ongoing gaps in testing in the global supply chain. The finding underscores the challenges of ensuring pesticide safety in food imports and the regulatory implications.
items.summary_zh: 在米饭、茶、香料等日常食品中检出欧盟禁用农药，暴露供应链检测与进口监管的薄弱环节。这一发现凸显全球食品贸易中确保农药安全的挑战与监管含义。

items.title_en: Full Reverse Engineering of the TI-84 Plus Operating System
items.title_zh: TI-84 Plus 操作系统的全面逆向工程
items.summary_en: A thorough reverse engineering of TI-84 Plus OS uncovers the calculator’s firmware internals, from its file system to app loading and security boundaries. The project energizes retro-computing communities and illustrates how hobbyist reverse engineering keeps classic devices relevant.
items.summary_zh: 对 TI-84 Plus 操作系统进行的全面逆向工程，揭示计算器固件的内部工作原理、文件系统、应用加载与安全边界。这类工作推动复古计算社区，也显示了经典硬件的长期可维护性。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What are tools you have made for yourself since the advent of AI?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：自从 AI 兴起后你为自己做了哪些工具？
items.summary_en: Community members share a variety of personal tools they've built post-AI: prompt libraries, local model runners, data-cleaning scripts, task automation wrappers, and integrations that streamline workflows. The responses highlight pragmatic, small-scale engineering—glue code and utilities—that often deliver the most day-to-day productivity gains. The thread is a useful source of real-world patterns for leveraging AI practically rather than as research projects.
items.summary_zh: 社区用户列举了自 AI 兴起以来自制的工具：提示库、本地模型运行器、数据清理脚本、自动化包装器及各种集成，旨在简化工作流。回复显示，常常是那些务实的小工程（胶水代码与工具）在日常工作中带来最大生产力提升。该讨论为如何把 AI 实用化提供了现实范例。

items.title_en: Why are so many young people getting cancer?
items.title_zh: 为何有这么多年轻人患癌？研究者知道的与未知的
items.summary_en: Nature examines why cancer rates are rising among young people and what researchers do and don't know yet. The piece underscores the complexity of causes and the need for long-term data, while clarifying what remains uncertain.
items.summary_zh: Nature 文章探讨为何年轻人患癌比例上升，以及研究者已知与未知的方面。内容强调成因的复杂性、对长期数据的需求，以及哪些问题仍存在不确定性。

items.title_en: Dopamine Fracking
items.title_zh: 多巴胺开采
items.summary_en: A critique of how apps weaponize dopamine triggers to lock in user attention, i.e., dopamine fracking. It discusses engineering tricks used to maximize engagement and the long-term costs to well-being. It suggests alternative design practices that respect users’ time and autonomy.
items.summary_zh: 批判性地分析应用如何利用多巴胺反馈机制来锁定用户注意力，即所谓的‘多巴胺开采’。文中揭示了被用来最大化黏性的一些工程手段及其对长期健康的成本，并提出更具道德性的产品设计思路，强调尊重用户时间与自主权。

items.title_en: Zig by Example
items.title_zh: Zig by Example：通过示例学习 Zig 语言
items.summary_en: Zig by Example provides a hands-on guide to the Zig programming language, teaching syntax and idioms through practical samples. It helps readers grasp low-level concepts common in systems programming and compare Zig's approach to C and Rust.
items.summary_zh: Zig by Example 提供一份以示例驱动的Zig语言学习指南，通过实际代码样例教授语法与常用模式。帮助读者掌握系统编程中的底层概念，并对照C与Rust等语言的设计取舍。

items.title_en: The Cypherpunk Library
items.title_zh: Cypherpunk 图书馆
items.summary_en: The Cypherpunk Library curates a collection of cypherpunk writings and related materials that trace privacy, cryptography, and decentralized technologies across decades. It serves as a valuable resource for researchers and practitioners seeking historical context and practical insights into how code and policy intersect in digital civil liberties.
items.summary_zh: 该档案汇集了大量 Cypherpunk 派系的著作与相关资料，展示隐私、密码学与去中心化技术的演变。它为研究者和从业者提供理解数字公民自由在技术与治理交汇处的历史与实践洞见。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gitdot – a better GitHub. Open-source, written in Rust
items.title_zh: Show HN: Gitdot — 更好的 GitHub，开源且用 Rust 编写
items.summary_en: Gitdot is an open-source, self-hostable GitHub alternative written in Rust that focuses on performance and simplicity. It aims to offer familiar collaboration features while giving teams control over data and deployment, appealing to organizations wary of centralized platforms. Rust implementation promises speed and safety for large repositories and many concurrent users.
items.summary_zh: Gitdot 是一个用 Rust 编写的开源、自托管的 GitHub 替代方案，强调性能与简洁性。它提供熟悉的协作功能，同时让团队掌控数据与部署，适合对集中式平台持保留态度的组织。Rust 的实现有助于在大仓库和高并发场景中提升速度与稳定性。

items.title_en: How much of Thermo Fisher's antibody data has been manipulated?
items.title_zh: Thermo Fisher 的抗体数据被操纵？
items.summary_en: The post alleges that a significant share of Thermo Fisher’s antibody data may have been manipulated, raising concerns about data integrity, reproducibility, and trust in biotech datasets. It argues that industry-scale data manipulation would have serious implications for research, diagnostics, and investor confidence.
items.summary_zh: 文章指称 Thermo Fisher 的抗体数据可能存在大量操控，引发对数据完整性、可重复性以及生物技术数据集信任度的担忧。若属实，这种规模的数据操纵将对科研、诊断和投资者信心产生严重影响。

items.title_en: I replaced Spotify with a homemade FM radio station
items.title_zh: 我用自制的 FM 广播取代了 Spotify
items.summary_en: I swapped Spotify for a homemade FM radio station, embracing local broadcasting and DIY tech tinkering. The move highlights the appeal of DIY, privacy-conscious media versus centralized streaming, and the charm of low-latency, offline-friendly listening.
items.summary_zh: 用自制的 FM 广播取代了 Spotify，进行本地化的内容编排与广播。此举体现了 DIY、注重隐私的媒体形态相对于集中式流媒体的吸引力，以及低延迟、可离线收听的乐趣。

items.title_en: OpenAI Confidentially Files for IPO
items.title_zh: OpenAI 秘密申请上市
items.summary_en: OpenAI has privately filed paperwork signaling an IPO process is underway, a move that brings the AI sector closer to mainstream public markets and could set valuation benchmarks for the industry. The filing will trigger scrutiny around corporate structure, investor rights, and how OpenAI balances profit motives with safety commitments. Public listing would reshape funding dynamics and transparency expectations for large AI labs.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 已秘密提交上市申请文件，表明其正推进 IPO 流程，这将促使 AI 行业更接近公开市场并可能成为估值标杆。该申报将引发对公司结构、投资者权益及 OpenAI 如何在营利与安全承诺间取得平衡的审查。若上市，将重塑大型 AI 实验室的融资格局与透明度期待。

items.title_en: Building from zero after addiction, prison, and a felony
items.title_zh: 从零开始：戒瘾、监狱与重罪后的重建
items.summary_en: From addiction, prison, and a felony, the author documents rebuilding life and career from scratch. Through skill-building, persistence, and supportive networks, the story offers practical insights for reintegration and second chances in tech.
items.summary_zh: 这篇自传式博文讲述在克服成瘾、服刑与刑事定罪后，作者如何从零开始重建生活与职业。通过建立技能、坚持不懈和依靠网络的支持，探讨在科技领域重新融入和把握第二次机会的可行路径。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Why hasn't there been a real competitor to Ticketmaster yet?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：为什么还没有真正能与 Ticketmaster 竞争的对手？
items.summary_en: Discussions on why there isn’t a true competitor to Ticketmaster, touching on barriers like venue relationships, fees, and resale controls. It weighs whether tech-enabled startups can disrupt the ticketing monopoly or if incumbents’ networks persist.
items.summary_zh: 讨论为何尚无真正能与 Ticketmaster 竞争的对手，涉及场馆关系、服务费与转售管控等 barriers。评估科技驱动的初创企业是否有机会打破垄断，还是网络效应将继续主导市场。

items.title_en: Thunderbird Littering My Home
items.title_zh: Thunderbird 在家目录乱丢文件
items.summary_en: Thunderbird is leaving a mess in the home directory, likely through misconfigured caches or data paths.
items.summary_zh: Thunderbird 在家目录中留下大量无用文件，通常与缓存或数据路径配置有关。强调桌面应用应提供清晰的默认数据路径并可配置选项，尤其是邮件客户端。

items.title_en: I'm building a parallel internet, and it's called The Thinnernet
items.title_zh: 我在构建一个平行互联网，名为 The Thinnernet
items.summary_en: The Thinnernet is an effort to build a lightweight, parallel internet focused on resilience, privacy, and decentralization—likely using mesh, p2p, and minimal protocols to bypass centralized infrastructure. The project emphasizes small-footprint services and user control, aiming to work in constrained or censored environments. It’s part of a broader wave of experiments exploring alternatives to today's centralized web.
items.summary_zh: The Thinnernet 旨在构建一个轻量的平行互联网，强调弹性、隐私与去中心化，可能采用网格、点对点和精简协议以绕过集中式基础设施。该项目注重小体量服务与用户控制，适用于受限或受审查的环境。它属于探索当今集中化网络替代方案的实验浪潮。

items.title_en: Italy's Bending Spoons, owner of AOL and Vimeo, files for Nasdaq IPO
items.title_zh: 意大利公司 Bending Spoons，AOL 与 Vimeo 的拥有者，提交纳斯达克上市申请
items.summary_en: Italy's Bending Spoons, known for owning AOL and Vimeo, files for Nasdaq IPO, illustrating how European software players are seeking U.S. listings amid global capital markets.
items.summary_zh: 意大利公司 Bending Spoons，AOL 与 Vimeo 的所有者，提交在纳斯达克上市的申请，体现欧洲软件企业在全球资本市场寻求美股上市的趋势。

items.title_en: LLMs are eroding my software engineering career and I don't know what to do
items.title_zh: 大型语言模型正在侵蚀我的软件工程职业生涯，我不知道该怎么办
items.summary_en: A software engineer voices concern that LLMs are eroding the profession, prompting a re-think of skill sets. Practical responses include leaning into AI-assisted design and architecture, or shifting toward areas where human judgment remains essential.
items.summary_zh: 一位软件工程师表达担忧：大型语言模型正在侵蚀这个职业，促使重新考量个人的技能组合。可行的应对路径包括更深入利用 AI 辅助的设计/架构工作，或转向需要人类判断的领域。

items.title_en: Donut Lab's 'solid-state' battery exposed as regular li-ion in investigation
items.title_zh: 调查揭露 Donut Lab 所称“固态”电池实为普通锂离子电池
items.summary_en: An investigation found that Donut Lab's touted 'solid-state' battery cells were actually conventional lithium-ion cells, raising allegations of misrepresentation and eroding credibility. The revelation prompts scrutiny of startup claims in battery tech, where demonstrations can be misleading and independent verification is crucial. Investors and partners will likely demand clearer evidence and testing protocols before backing similar promises.
items.summary_zh: 调查发现 Donut Lab 所宣称的“固态”电池并非真正固态，而是常规锂离子电池，涉嫌夸大与误导，严重损害了信誉。此事让电池技术领域的创业宣传受到更严格审视，表明演示可能存在误导，必须依赖独立验证。投资者与合作方很可能在支持类似承诺前要求更明确的证据与测试流程。

items.title_en: DeepSeek V4 Pro beats GPT-5.5 Pro on precision
items.title_zh: DeepSeek V4 Pro 在精度上胜过 GPT-5.5 Pro
items.summary_en: DeepSeek V4 Pro claims higher precision than GPT-5.5 Pro in benchmark tasks, signaling improvements in dedicated AI tooling. The claim invites scrutiny of evaluation methods and raises questions about when proprietary vs open models trade accuracy for safety and speed.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek V4 Pro 在基准测试中声称在精度上超越 GPT-5.5 Pro，显示在专用工具上的改进。这一说法需要审视评测方法，并引发关于专有与开源模型在准确性、安全性与性能之间权衡的问题。

items.title_en: Are you expected to run five Python type-checkers now?
items.title_zh: 现在是不是得同时运行五个 Python 类型检查器？
items.summary_en: An exploration of Python's type-checking ecosystem, questioning whether the community has become bloated with multiple checkers and proposing strategies for standardization or better interoperability. It highlights tradeoffs between type safety, velocity, and tool complexity.
items.summary_zh: 关于 Python 类型检查工具生态的探讨质疑社区是否被多种检查器所堆叠，提出标准化或更好互操作性的策略。强调类型安全、开发速度与工具复杂性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Spanish traders set the standard for GnuCash database design
items.title_zh: 西班牙交易者为 GnuCash 数据库设计设定标准
items.summary_en: Spanish traders illustrate best practices for GnuCash database design, sharing practical schema choices and accounting workflows that influence open-source finance software design.
items.summary_zh: 西班牙交易者在 GnuCash 数据库设计上树立了实用的标准，分享了具体的模式选择与会计工作流程，对开源金融软件设计有借鉴意义。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Intuned (YC S22) – Build and run reliable browser automations as code
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Intuned（YC S22）— 将可靠的浏览器自动化以代码形式构建并运行
items.summary_en: Intuned enables building and running browser automations as code, improving reliability and reproducibility across environments. As a YC S22 alum, it signals investor interest in programmable browser automation tooling that can be versioned and integrated into CI/CD workflows.
items.summary_zh: Intuned 使浏览器自动化以代码形式构建并运行，提升可重复性并减少环境间的脆弱性。作为 YC S22 的毕业项目，它体现了对可版本化、可集成到 CI/CD 流程中的浏览器自动化工具的投资关注。

items.title_en: 1k Data Breaches Later, the Disclosure Lag Is Worse
items.title_zh: 经历千起数据泄露后，披露延迟更严重
items.summary_en: An analysis of 1,000 breaches shows the disclosure lag is worse than ever, delaying risk awareness and response. The lengthy gap undermines timely remediation and transparent risk communication. The takeaway: invest in faster detection, real-time telemetry, and stronger breach notification practices.
items.summary_zh: 对1000起数据泄露的分析显示披露延迟比以往更长，延缓风险识别与应对。长时间的间隔削弱了及时修复和透明的风险沟通。核心要点是加强快速检测、实时遥测，以及更强的泄露通知机制。

items.title_en: Age verification tech could put children at greater risk, says think tank
items.title_zh: 年龄验证技术可能增加儿童风险？
items.summary_en: Think tank warns that age-verification technology could increase risk for children by broadening data collection and surveillance; calls for privacy-preserving designs and robust governance to mitigate harms.
items.summary_zh: 智库警告年龄验证技术可能因扩大数据收集和监控而增加儿童风险，呼吁采用隐私保护设计与健全治理来降低潜在危害。

items.title_en: How's Linear so fast? A technical breakdown
items.title_zh: Linear 为何如此快？一份技术拆解
items.summary_en: A deep dive into Linear's performance, explaining how the product achieves snappy UX from API design to frontend optimizations. The breakdown covers efficient data fetching, caching, optimistic UI, and deployment choices, with takeaways for building fast SaaS apps.
items.summary_zh: 本文从 API 设计到前端优化，解析 Linear 如何实现流畅的用户体验。重点包括高效数据获取、缓存、乐观 UI 和基础设施部署等要点，以及对构建快速 SaaS 应用的可借鉴之处。

items.title_en: Replies to comments on my "LLMs are eroding my career" post
items.title_zh: 对我《LLMs 正在侵蚀我的职业生涯》一文的评论回复
items.summary_en: Replies add nuance to a heated debate: some commentators warn that LLMs will subsume routine tasks, while others argue they can augment professionals when used as intelligent tools. The thread emphasizes upskilling, specialization, and designing workflows that combine human judgment with AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 回复为激烈辩论增添了细腻观点：部分评论者警告大模型将取代常规任务，而另一些则认为若作为智能工具使用，能提高专业人员的生产力。讨论强调提升技能、专业化，以及设计能将人类判断与 AI 能力结合的工作流程。

items.title_en: New drug 'functionally cures' many hepatitis B virus infections
items.title_zh: 新药能在多数乙肝感染者身上实现功能性治愈
items.summary_en: A study reports a drug that functionally cures many hepatitis B infections, achieving sustained viral control after treatment in a substantial portion of patients. Functionally cured patients can discontinue therapy while maintaining low viral activity, representing a potential paradigm shift in HBV treatment. Still, larger trials and long-term follow-up are needed.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究报道一种新药能在相当数量的乙型肝炎病毒感染者身上实现功能性治愈，治疗后可维持长期病毒控制。功能性治愈意味着在停止治疗后仍能保持低水平的病毒活性，可能改变乙肝治疗的格局。然而，仍需在更大规模的试验和长期随访中验证。

items.title_en: OneDrive data now has an expiry date
items.title_zh: OneDrive 数据现在有到期日期
items.summary_en: Microsoft is rolling out an expiry mechanism for OneDrive data, enabling automatic deletion or renewal rules for files and shared items after a defined period. The change reshapes data lifecycle management, retention policies, and user expectations around what persists in the cloud.
items.summary_zh: 微软开始在 OneDrive 中引入到期机制，允许对文件和共享项设定过期规则，逾期后自动删除或触发续存。此举影响数据生命周期管理、合规策略以及用户对云端数据可持续性的预期。

items.title_en: The Smallest Brain You Can Build: A Perceptron in Python
items.title_zh: 你能构建的最小大脑：用 Python 实现感知机
items.summary_en: From-scratch, it implements a single-layer perceptron in Python, covering weights, bias, and the basic learning rule. The write-up emphasizes intuition and practical code you can run to see how simple linear classifiers learn. A handy primer for getting hands-on with neural networks before moving to deeper models.
items.summary_zh: 从零开始用 Python 实现一个简单的感知机，讲解权重、偏置和学习规则等核心概念。该文注重直观理解，给出可运行的代码，帮助你直观感受线性分类器的学习过程。是入门神经网络的实用入门材料。

items.title_en: APC–2 – A professional record cutter for producing original playback discs
items.title_zh: APC-2：专业级刻录机，制作原始播放唱片
items.summary_en: APC-2 is a professional vinyl cutter enabling artists to produce original playback discs, bypassing traditional mastering and pressing for small runs. It promises precise cuts and smoother workflow integration with modern audio tools, signaling a DIY resurgence in physical media. For independent artists, it lowers barriers to producing limited edition discs without large-scale facilities.
items.summary_zh: APC-2 是一台专业级刻录机，使艺术家能够制作原创播放唱片，绕过传统的母带与压片流程以实现小批量生产。它承诺高精度切割和与现代音频工具的无缝对接，标志着实体媒体的DIY复兴。对于独立艺术家而言，这意味着无需大规模厂房也能发行限量版唱片。

items.title_en: Anthropic, please ship an official Claude Desktop for Linux
items.title_zh: Anthropic，请为 Linux 发布官方 Claude 桌面客户端
items.summary_en: There is a call for an official Linux desktop app for Claude; currently users rely on web or unofficial options, creating cross-platform friction. A native client would improve performance, privacy, and workflow integration for developers and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 呼吁为 Claude 发布官方 Linux 桌面应用；目前多数用户依赖网页或非官方方案，跨平台工作流受阻。原生客户端将提升性能、隐私和开发者工作流整合。

items.title_en: The IRS Moved IT and HR Staff to Process Taxes. It's Not Going Well
items.title_zh: IRS 将 IT 与 HR 员工调往税务处理任务，情况不太顺利
items.summary_en: IRS moved IT and HR staff to tax processing tasks, leading to outages and inefficiencies. The situation highlights the risks of reorganizing government IT around mission-critical processes and the need for stable, purpose-built systems.
items.summary_zh: IRS 将 IT 与 HR 员工调往税务处理任务，导致系统故障与效率下降。这凸显政府 IT 项目在资源重新配置中的风险，以及对稳定、专用系统的需求。

items.title_en: Making peace with your unlived dreams (2023)
items.title_zh: 与未实现的梦想和解
items.summary_en: Making Peace with Your Unlived Dreams explores accepting unpursued paths while focusing energy on meaningful goals. It encourages reframing setbacks as part of growth and using intentional choices to move forward. A mindful take on ambition and contentment in tech life.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇关于与尚未实现的梦想和解的反思文章，倡导承认未实现的可能性并把精力放在真正重要的目标上。文中提供将挫折视为成长过程的一部分的思考与建议。

items.title_en: Show HN: Lathe – Use LLMs to learn a new domain, not skip past it
items.title_zh: Show HN：Lathe——用大模型深入学习新领域，而非走马观花
items.summary_en: Lathe uses LLMs to thoroughly learn a new domain rather than skimming it, enabling deeper understanding and reproducible workflows. This approach highlights how AI can augment genuine knowledge acquisition, not just search or prompt tailoring.
items.summary_zh: Lathe 通过大模型深入学习一个新领域，而不是走马观花，从而实现更深的理解和可重复的工作流。这显示了 AI 能力在真正的知识获取方面的潜力，而不仅仅是搜索或提示微调。

items.title_en: 1worldflag: A blue dot on a transparent background
items.title_zh: 1worldflag：透明背景上的蓝点旗帜
items.summary_en: 1worldflag provides a minimalist global flag asset—a blue dot on a transparent canvas—intended for simple, universal branding and web use. This kind of open, easily styled symbol reflects a trend toward lightweight, interoperable design assets.
items.summary_zh: 1worldflag 提供一个极简的全球旗帜图标——透明背景上的蓝点，适用于通用品牌和网页设计。这样的公开、易于使用的符号体现了对轻量级、互操作设计资源的偏好。

items.title_en: SoulsOnly.tff – A font for humans not AI and keyboard firmware to type in it
items.title_zh: SoulsOnly.tff：为人类设计的字体，以及可在键盘固件中输入此字体的实现
items.summary_en: SoulsOnly.tff presents a font designed for humans rather than AI, with an accompanying keyboard firmware approach to type in the font. It highlights a human-centric typography movement and hardware-aware design choices.
items.summary_zh: SoulsOnly.tff 提供一款为人类设计的字体，并附带可在键盘固件中输入该字体的实现方式。此举体现了以人为本的字体设计趋势，以及对硬件友好设计的探索。

items.title_en: Man jailed for a month despite Flock showing he was 5 miles from crime scene
items.title_zh: 男子因 Flock 显示其距案发现场 5 英里而被关押一个月
items.summary_en: A legal case where a man was jailed for a month despite a facial recognition system showing he was far from the crime scene, highlighting concerns about algorithmic bias, misidentification, and the limits of surveillance tech in policing. It underscores the need for clearer standards and accountability.
items.summary_zh: 报道一名男子因面部识别系统显示其距离案发现场很远而被关押一个月，引发对算法偏差、误识别以及监控技术在执法中的局限性的担忧。强调对相关标准和问责的需求。

items.title_en: Richard Scolyer Has Died
items.title_zh: 理查德·斯科卢耶去世
items.summary_en: Renowned Australian melanoma pathologist Richard Scolyer has died, leaving a major legacy in cancer genomics and diagnostic pathology. Tributes praise his contributions to melanoma research, international collaborations, and the standardization of diagnostic practices.
items.summary_zh: 澳大利亚知名黑素瘤病理学家理查德·斯科卢耶去世，长期致力于癌症基因组学与诊断病理学领域。 各界对他的贡献表示缅怀，肯定他在黑色素瘤研究、国际合作与诊断规范化方面的影响。

items.title_en: Algorithmic Monocultures in Hiring
items.title_zh: 招聘中的算法单一化问题
items.summary_en: A project argues that automated hiring pipelines can create algorithmic monocultures by over-filtering for narrow signals. It warns of bias amplification and reduced diversity, and advocates for transparent features, human-in-the-loop checks, and diverse training data. The takeaway is to design hiring tools that broaden rather than narrow candidate pools.
items.summary_zh: 该项目指出自动化招聘流程可能通过过度依赖狭窄信号而形成算法性单一化。它警示偏见放大和多样性下降，并主张采用透明特征、人工干预和多样化训练数据。核心要点是让招聘工具拓宽而非缩窄候选人池。

items.title_en: A Matter Wi-Fi Light Bulb in Rust on the Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W
items.title_zh: Matter Wi-Fi 灯泡：在 Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W 上用 Rust 实现
items.summary_en: Demonstrates building a Matter-enabled Wi‑Fi light bulb using Rust on the Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W, showcasing a secure, memory-safe IoT path. It highlights how Rust and open standards can simplify building reliable smart home devices on tiny microcontrollers.
items.summary_zh: 展示在 Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W 上用 Rust 构建符合 Matter 标准的 Wi‑Fi 灯泡，体现了一个安全、内存安全的物联网实现路径。该项目展示了 Rust 与开源标准如何简化在微控制器上开发可靠的智能家居设备。

items.title_en: The 29th International Obfuscated C Code Contest (IOCCC) 2025 Winners
items.title_zh: 第29届国际混淆C代码竞赛（IOCCC）2025 获奖作品
items.summary_en: IOCCC 2025 winners showcase the year's boldest obfuscated C programs, pushing compilers and tricks to the extreme. Entries rely on preprocessor gymnastics, clever data encodings, and unusual memory tricks to fit a program into tiny form factors. They illustrate C's expressive boundaries while underscoring the importance of readability in real-world code.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年 IOCCC 获奖作品展现了年度最具创造性的混淆 C 代码，常用预处理器花招、另类数据表示和内存布局技巧。此类作品凸显 C 的灵活性，同时也提醒在实际软件开发中注重可读性与可维护性的重要性，并展示数十年演进后的仍具实现空间的编程模式。

items.title_en: Config Files That Run Code: Supply Chain Security Blindspot
items.title_zh: 会执行代码的配置文件：供应链安全盲点
items.summary_en: Config files that run code create a security blindspot in software supply chains, because they allow executing code during builds or deployments. The piece argues for guardrails like signing, access controls, and reproducible environments to mitigate risk.
items.summary_zh: 会执行代码的配置文件构成供应链安全的盲点，因为它们可能在构建或部署阶段执行未受信代码。文章倡导通过签名、访问控制与可重复的环境等措施来降低风险。

items.title_en: Texas grid flags risks as data centers, crypto sites fail voltage tests
items.title_zh: 德州电网警示风险：数据中心与加密矿场在电压测试中失稳
items.summary_en: Texas grid warns of risks as data centers and crypto sites fail voltage tests, highlighting grid reliability concerns amid rising demand from a tech-forward economy.
items.summary_zh: 德州电网发布风险警示，原因是数据中心与加密矿场在电压测试中出现问题，凸显在高需求科技经济背景下的电网可靠性挑战。

items.title_en: GitHub Is Down
items.title_zh: GitHub 宕机
items.summary_en: An outage at GitHub disrupts code hosting, CI pipelines, and collaboration workflows, stressing the fragility of critical developer infrastructure. It notes incident duration, recovery steps, and potential impact on open-source projects.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 故障中断了代码托管、持续集成等开发者工作流，凸显关键开发基础设施的脆弱性。文中回顾事件时长、恢复过程及对开源项目的潜在影响。

items.title_en: The EU Open Source Strategy
items.title_zh: 欧盟开源战略
items.summary_en: The EU unveils an Open Source Strategy to strengthen software independence, security, and innovation, likely detailing funding, procurement preferences, and governance for OSS across public sectors. The plan signals Europe’s intent to boost OSS adoption while addressing interoperability and supply chain resilience.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟公布开放源代码战略，旨在提升软件自主性与安全性，推动公共部门 OSS 的广泛应用，涵盖资金、采购与治理等方面。 该计划强调增强互操作性和供应链韧性，推动欧洲在开源领域的长期创新。

items.title_en: Amazon Cognito now supports multi-Region replication
items.title_zh: Amazon Cognito 现支持多区域复制
items.summary_en: Amazon Cognito now supports multi-Region replication, enabling cross-region user pools and resilience for authentication data. This reduces latency for global apps and simplifies disaster recovery for identity data.
items.summary_zh: Amazon Cognito 现已支持多区域复制，便于跨区域同步用户池并提升认证数据的韧性。此举可降低全球应用的延迟，并简化身份数据的灾备策略。

items.title_en: I design with Claude more than Figma now
items.title_zh: 我现在用 Claude 设计多于 Figma
items.summary_en: Jane Street’s design workflow increasingly relies on Claude to ideate and iterate designs, surpassing traditional Figma reliance. The author notes Claude’s reasoning and code-assisted capabilities speed up layout and prototype work, though human oversight remains essential for visual polish.
items.summary_zh: Jane Street 的设计流程越来越多地借助 Claude 来构思和迭代设计，甚至超过了对 Figma 的依赖。文章指出在文本驱动设计与原型实现中，Claude 的推理与代码能力能显著提速，但仍需人工把控视觉细节。

items.title_en: 7.8 magnitude earthquake shakes part of southern Philippines. Tsunami possible
items.title_zh: 菲律宾南部发生7.8级地震，可能引发海啸
items.summary_en: An offshore earthquake of magnitude 7.8 rattled southern Philippines, with a tsunami alert possibly issued; authorities urged evacuations and monitoring for aftershocks.
items.summary_zh: 菲律宾南部发生7.8级地震，可能触发海啸警报。当地机构已发出撤离和继续监测余震的指示。

items.title_en: Office-open-xml-viewer: Office XML document viewer that renders to HTML Canvas
items.title_zh: Office Open XML 查看器：将 Office XML 文档渲染到 HTML 画布
items.summary_en: Office Open XML Viewer renders Office documents to HTML Canvas, enabling client-side viewing and interactive rendering without server-side conversion.
items.summary_zh: Office Open XML Viewer 将 Office 文档渲染为 HTML Canvas，支持客户端渲染与互动查看，减少对服务器端转换的依赖。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How to escalate a rejected Google extension?
items.title_zh: 如何对被拒绝的 Google 扩展提出上诉？
items.summary_en: Tips for escalating a rejected Google extension submission, including gathering evidence, adjusting manifest settings, and communicating with reviewers. Practical advice for navigating the Chrome Web Store approval process.
items.summary_zh: 就被 Google 扩展商店拒绝的上诉问题，给出收集证据、调整清单设置以及与审核团队沟通的实用建议，帮助开发者推进申诉流程。

items.title_en: New Referendum Would Flip Brexit Result 10 Years On, Poll Finds
items.title_zh: 新公投十年后或翻转 Brexit 结果？民调显示
items.summary_en: A new referendum could flip Brexit results a decade later, according to polls. The finding underscores political volatility in UK-EU relations and potential implications for markets, regulatory alignment, and cross-border collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 民调显示，十年后可能举行的新公投将逆转脱欧结果，凸显英欧关系的持续不确定性及其对市场、监管一致性和跨境合作的潜在影响。

items.title_en: An Ohio Valley 100k-watt FM signal is severed in broad daylight
items.title_zh: 俄亥俄谷地10万瓦 FM 信号在白天中断
items.summary_en: A 100 kW FM radio signal in the Ohio Valley was severed in broad daylight, highlighting vulnerabilities in broadcast infrastructure and the potential for sabotage or weather-related outages.
items.summary_zh: 俄亥俄谷地一处10万瓦 FM 信号在白天突然中断，暴露了广播基础设施的脆弱性以及潜在的破坏或天气相关中断风险。

items.title_en: Podman 6: machine usability improvements (2025)
items.title_zh: Podman 6：机器可用性改进（2025）
items.summary_en: Podman 6 delivers machine usability improvements, simplifying how developers interact with machine-based workflows in the container ecosystem. The update tightens defaults, improves CLI ergonomics, and strengthens rootless operations. It lowers the barrier to productive, daemonless container workloads.
items.summary_zh: Podman 6 对机器相关命令带来可用性改进，简化了上手与生命周期管理，降低非 Root 模式下使用容器的门槛。更新聚焦于提高开发者在日常容器工作流中的效率与自动化能力。

items.title_en: Do agents.md files help coding agents?
items.title_zh: Do agents.md 文件有助于编码代理吗？
items.summary_en: The tweet asks whether agents.md files aid coding agents, likely exploring whether structured documentation improves automation, reproducibility, and tool usage for autonomous coding agents. The takeaway: good, machine-readable guidelines can reduce misalignment and improve tool orchestration.
items.summary_zh: 这条推文在探讨 agents.md 文件是否有助于编写编码代理，可能关注结构化文档在提升自动化、可重现性和工具协作中的作用。核心观点是，良好且机器可读的指南有助于减少错位并提升工具编排效果。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What was your "oh shit" moment with GenAI?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你在 GenAI 使用中的‘哦糟了’时刻是什么？
items.summary_en: A community prompt asking for the worst or funniest 'oh shit' moments with GenAI, highlighting surprising failures, hallucinations, and ethical concerns. It gathers practical anecdotes for risk awareness.
items.summary_zh: 社区发起 Ask HN，征集关于在生成式 AI 使用过程中的“哦糟了”时刻，揭示模型幻觉、局限及伦理风险等真实案例。

items.title_en: Terry Tao Became an Evangelist for AI in Math
items.title_zh: 陶哲轩成为数学领域的 AI 倡导者
items.summary_en: Terence Tao has emerged as a prominent advocate for applying AI to mathematics, reflecting a shift in how AI tools might assist proof discovery and pedagogy. The move sparks debates about AI's role in research verification and the future of math education.
items.summary_zh: 知名数学家陶哲轩成为 AI 在数学领域的倡导者，标志着 AI 工具在证明发现和教学中的潜在作用。这一转变引发了关于 AI 在研究验证及数学教育未来中所扮演角色的讨论。

items.title_en: Powering up a module from the IBM 604: an electronic calculator from 1948
items.title_zh: 为 IBM 604 的模块上电：1948 年电子计算器的复原之旅
items.summary_en: A hands-on look at powering up a modular unit from the IBM 604, a 1948 vacuum-tube calculator. It covers the challenges of reviving vintage hardware, including high-voltage power supplies and precise on/off sequencing. The project offers a tangible window into the engineering trade-offs that paved the way for later transistorized machines.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章实地讲解如何为 IBM 604 的一个模块上电，展示了1948年真空管计算器的复原难点。内容聚焦高压供电、上电顺序等技术挑战，以及这类早期硬件在设计取舍上的历史教训。通过复原，可以直观感受推动后续晶体管化的工程演进。

items.title_en: My automated doubt development process
items.title_zh: 我的自动化怀疑发展过程
items.summary_en: My automated doubt development process describes a workflow that surfaces or generates doubts during reasoning to curb bias and improve decisions. It outlines how automation can replay scenarios, challenge assumptions, and log doubts for later review. A meta-tool for more disciplined thinking.
items.summary_zh: 作者描述了一种自动化过程，用于在推理中产出或揭示怀疑点，以抵消偏见并提升决策质量。文中可能讲解如何通过自动化重现情景、挑战假设，并将疑问记录以便复盘。

items.title_en: Cloning a Sennheiser BA2015 battery pack
items.title_zh: 克隆 Sennheiser BA2015 电池组
items.summary_en: Cloning a Sennheiser BA2015 battery pack involves reverse-engineering the cells and protection circuitry to reproduce the pack. It highlights the tension between extending hardware life and ensuring safety.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章聚焦于克隆 Sennheiser BA2015 电池组，涉及对电池组单元、保护电路与外形的逆向分析。内容强调在延长硬件寿命时的安全风险与可行替代方案，并体现黑客精神与实用性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: I Derived a Pancake
items.title_zh: Show HN：我推导出一个煎饼配方
items.summary_en: A Show HN sharing a derivation-based approach to making pancakes, turning a kitchen recipe into a reproducible, nerdy process. It demonstrates how systematic thinking can yield predictable texture and flavor outcomes, even for everyday cooking.
items.summary_zh: 该 Show HN 展示了一种以推导和实验为基础的煎饼配方设计，给出可重复的步骤和参数。它证明将系统化思考应用于日常烹饪也能带来可预测的口感与口味。

items.title_en: What is the purpose of the lost+found folder in Linux and Unix? (2014)
items.title_zh: Linux/Unix 的 lost+found 文件夹有什么用？（2014）
items.summary_en: The lost+found folder stores inodes recovered after filesystem checks, acting as a repository for orphaned fragments following a crash. It’s mostly of interest to those doing recovery or forensics, not day-to-day users. The feature embodies how Linux/Unix handles recovery while preserving data remnants.
items.summary_zh: lost+found 文件夹是在 Linux/Unix 文件系统自检修复（fsck）时用于存放恢复的 inode 的位置。它保存着在崩溃后被重建出的碎片和孤儿数据，通常并不面向普通用户。其存在的意义在于协助从损坏的文件系统中找回数据。

items.title_en: Life is too short for a slow terminal
items.title_zh: 生活太短，慢速终端不可忍
items.summary_en: A personal take urging developers to optimize their terminal and tooling for speed, with recommendations for faster shells, fonts, and workflows. The piece emphasizes user experience and the compounding benefits of a snappier dev workflow.
items.summary_zh: 作者呼吁开发者优化终端与工具以提升速度，提出更快的 shell、字体和工作流的建议。强调用户体验的重要性，以及更高效的开发流程带来的叠加收益。

items.title_en: Playing with Vision Embeddings
items.title_zh: Playing with Vision Embeddings
items.summary_en: Explorations with vision embeddings reveal how visual features can be mapped into embedding spaces, enabling tasks like image retrieval, style transfer, or multimodal learning. The post shares experiments and practical takeaways for practitioners building vision-language systems.
items.summary_zh: 对视觉嵌入进行尝试，展示如何将视觉特征映射到嵌入空间，以实现图片检索、风格迁移或多模态学习等任务。 文中分享实验结果和对构建视觉-语言系统的实用要点。

items.title_en: OCaml Onboarding: Introduction to the Dune build system
items.title_zh: OCaml 入门：Dune 构建系统导览
items.summary_en: Dune is the de facto build system for OCaml projects, handling dependencies, builds, and packaging with sensible defaults. This onboarding guide helps newcomers set up projects quickly and learn best practices for reproducible builds.
items.summary_zh: Dune 是 OCaml 的事实标准构建系统，负责依赖、构建和打包。这份入门指南帮助新手快速搭建项目，并学习可重复构建的最佳实践。

items.title_en: A Family Project (2022)
items.title_zh: A Family Project
items.summary_en: A bittersweet profile of a family undertaking a long-term collaborative project, highlighting how shared labor reshapes relationships, memory, and daily life. The piece blends craft, storytelling, and resilience to reveal why family projects endure beyond a single outcome.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于一家人共同完成长期项目的感性特写，展现协作如何重塑关系、记忆与日常生活。通过手作、叙事与坚持精神，揭示家庭项目为何在产出之外持续存在于家庭生活之中。

items.title_en: Tiny hackable CUDA language model implementation
items.title_zh: Tiny hackable CUDA language model implementation
items.summary_en: A compact CUDA-based LLM implementation invites experimentation with low-level GPU optimization and training tricks. It serves as a hands-on template for researchers to prototype, benchmark, and understand the limits of tiny language models on consumer GPUs.
items.summary_zh: 一个小型、可 Hack 的 CUDA 语言模型实现，便于直接在 GPU 上进行低层次优化与训练技巧的实验。 为研究者提供一个动手模板，用以原型设计、基准测试，并理解小型语言模型在消费级 GPU 上的极限。

items.title_en: Zig Structs of Arrays (2024)
items.title_zh: Zig Struct of Arrays（2024）
items.summary_en: Zig Struct of Arrays (SoA) discusses data-oriented design in Zig, contrasting structures of arrays vs arrays of structures and showing performance benefits for SIMD and cache locality. The post likely includes code patterns and benchmarks for practical adoption.
items.summary_zh: Zig 的 Struct of Arrays（SoA）主题探讨面向数据的设计，对比结构体数组与数组结构体，并展示在 SIMD 与缓存局部性方面的性能优势。 文中可能包含可操作的代码示例与基准。

items.title_en: Spherical Voronoi Diagram
items.title_zh: 球面 Voronoi 图
items.summary_en: Spherical Voronoi diagrams extend the classic Voronoi concept to curved surfaces, offering insights for geospatial tiling, astronomy, and global data visualization. The post likely showcases interactive examples and practical applications, from mapping to partitioning sensor networks.
items.summary_zh: 球面 Voronoi 图将经典的 Voronoi 分割推广到曲面上，为地理空间切片、天文数据分区与全球可视化提供新视角。 文中可能展示交互示例及在制图、传感器网络划分等方面的应用。

items.title_en: 120k Lines of Rust: Inside the Nosdesk Backend
items.title_zh: 120k 行 Rust：Nosdesk 后端内幕
items.summary_en: A Rust-based Nosdesk backend spans roughly 120k lines of code, offering a case study in building reliable, high-performance services with safe concurrency. The writeup covers architecture choices, crate usage, and how Rust underpins reliability.
items.summary_zh: Nosdesk 后端用 Rust 编写，约 12 万行代码，提供了高性能、可靠并发设计的实战案例。文章探讨架构选择、 crates 的使用，以及 Rust 如何提升系统健壮性。

items.title_en: Fooling Go's X.509 Certificate Verification
items.title_zh: 欺骗 Go 的 X.509 证书验证
items.summary_en: A technical write-up demonstrates ways to bypass or confuse Go's X.509 certificate verification, uncovering edge cases in certificate parsing and validation logic. The findings expose how subtle implementation details can undermine TLS trust, with concrete recommendations for patches and safer libraries. This matters for anyone relying on Go for secure networking—especially servers and clients handling diverse certificate sources.
items.summary_zh: 技术文章展示了如何利用 Go 的 X.509 证书验证中的边界情况进行绕过或迷惑验证流程，揭示了证书解析与校验逻辑中的细微问题。文中给出具体修补建议并推荐更安全的库实现。对依赖 Go 进行安全网络通信的服务端与客户端尤其重要。

items.title_en: Giant Floating Victorian Drydock
items.title_zh: 世界上最大的漂浮式干船坞
items.summary_en: Historic engineering feat: the world’s largest floating dry dock was towed across the Atlantic to Bermuda in 1869, illustrating 19th-century maritime ingenuity and the scale of industrial-age ships' maintenance. The tale blends technology, logistics, and regional history.
items.summary_zh: 史上最大的漂浮式干船坞在1869年横跨大西洋被拖往百慕大，展现19世纪海运工程与造船维护能力的规模与胆识。这段历史兼具技术、物流与区域史的交织。

items.title_en: Backrest – a web UI and orchestrator for restic backup
items.title_zh: Backrest：restic 备份的网页界面与编排工具
items.summary_en: Backrest provides a web UI and orchestrator for restic backups, making configuration, scheduling, and monitoring easier. It offers a centralized view for multi-host backups and can reduce operational overhead. A practical boost for teams relying on restic in modern workflows.
items.summary_zh: Backrest 提供了一个用于 restic 备份的网页界面和编排工具，简化了配置、调度与监控。它使跨主机的备份管理更加直观，并通过集中式视图提升可靠性与协作效率。对于依赖 restic 的团队而言，能显著降低运维负担。

items.title_en: Do we fear the serializable isolation level more than we fear subtle bugs (2024)
items.title_zh: 我们是否更担心可串行化隔离级别，而非微妙的错误？
items.summary_en: Serializable isolation promises correctness but often adds complexity and performance costs that may cause more pain than the rare, subtle bugs it aims to prevent. The piece advocates pragmatic cross-checks, selective isolation, and robust testing to balance safety with practicality.
items.summary_zh: 可串行化隔离级别承诺正确性，但往往带来额外的复杂性与性能成本，反而让少数罕见的微妙错误带来更大痛点。文中倡导务实的并发检测、选择性隔离与充分测试，以实现安全性与实际可行性的平衡。

items.title_en: Splash Is a Colour Format
items.title_zh: Splash 是一种颜色格式
items.summary_en: Splash is a new color format that promises to optimize color representation for faster rendering and more efficient compression. If adopted by graphics pipelines and hardware, it could streamline image processing and real-time rendering.
items.summary_zh: Splash 是一种新颜色格式，致力于优化颜色表示、提升渲染效率或压缩性能。若被图形管线和硬件广泛采纳，可能影响图片处理与实时渲染的实现。

items.title_en: A discovery about GCC's unidirectional rotation algorithm
items.title_zh: GCC 的单向旋转算法新发现
items.summary_en: A discovery about GCC's unidirectional rotation algorithm reveals subtle behavior, shedding light on optimization decisions or edge-case handling in the compiler. The detail matters for low-level code, cryptography, and performance-sensitive software.
items.summary_zh: 关于 GCC 旋转算法的发现揭示了在单向旋转实现中的细微行为，帮助理解编译器在优化与边界情况处理上的取舍。对低级代码、密码学与高性能软件具有意义。

items.title_en: Man-Computer Symbiosis J. C. R. Licklider (1960)
items.title_zh: 人–机共生：J. C. R. 里克莱德（1960）
items.summary_en: J. C. R. Licklider's 1960 essay argued for a partnership between humans and computers, envisioning cooperative problem-solving and cumulative intelligence through networks. The concept underpins modern HCI and AI systems, shaping how we design interactive tech.
items.summary_zh: 1960 年，洛克利德提出了人机共生的设想，强调人和计算机携手协作、通过网络实现协同智能。该观点奠定了现代人机交互与人工智能系统的设计思路，影响至今。

items.title_en: Using XDG-Compliant Config Files (2024)
items.title_zh: 使用符合 XDG 规范的配置文件（2024）
items.summary_en: This guide explains how to adopt the XDG Base Directory specification for storing config, cache, and data files on Unix-like systems to avoid scattering files across home directories. It covers practical path choices, migration tips, and cross-platform considerations to make applications behave well on Linux and macOS. Following XDG conventions reduces clutter, improves portability, and makes system-wide management easier for users and package maintainers.
items.summary_zh: 这篇指南说明了如何在类 Unix 系统中采用 XDG 基础目录规范来存放配置、缓存和数据文件，避免将文件散落在 home 目录。内容涵盖路径选择、迁移建议以及跨平台注意点，帮助应用在 Linux 与 macOS 上表现良好。遵循 XDG 规范可减少杂乱、提升可移植性并方便系统与包管理。

items.title_en: A modular impact diverting mechanism for football helmets [pdf]
items.title_zh: 用于美式足球头盔的模块化冲击偏转机构（PDF）
items.summary_en: A study proposes a modular impact diverting mechanism for American football helmets, aiming to improve head protection. The concept, detailed in a PDF, could influence future helmet design standards and safety research.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究提出用于美式足球头盔的模块化冲击分流机构，旨在提升头部防护效果。该概念在 PDF 中有详细描述，或将影响未来头盔标准与安全性研究方向。

items.title_en: Trusted Computing Frequently Asked Questions (2003)
items.title_zh: 2003 年的可信计算常见问题解答
items.summary_en: Historical FAQ on trusted computing lays out core concepts, threat models, and hardware-software trust boundaries that have shaped secure computing debates for two decades. It offers a snapshot of early disagreements and clarifications in the field.
items.summary_zh: 这份关于可信计算的历史性常见问答梗概了核心概念、威胁模型与硬件—软件信任边界，为两十多年来的安全计算讨论提供了早期观点的快照。

items.title_en: Doing Something That's Never Been Done Before
items.title_zh: 做前所未有之事
items.summary_en: A reflective piece about attempting something genuinely novel, outlining personal motivations, challenges, and the trade-offs involved in pursuing uncharted technical or product work. It discusses the psychological and practical aspects of tackling problems without prior templates and why that path can be rewarding despite high uncertainty.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于尝试真正新事物的感想，阐述了个人动机、面临的挑战以及追求未被模板化工作的权衡。文中讨论了在无先例可循时的心理与实际问题，并说明尽管不确定性高，这条路为何仍值得走。

items.title_en: Show HN: Courtside – TUI for NBA Games
items.title_zh: Show HN: Courtside —— NBA 比赛的终端 UI
items.summary_en: Courtside is a terminal-based TUI that surfaces live NBA game information, scores, and stats for users who prefer command-line tools. It targets fans and developers wanting lightweight, scriptable access to game data without a browser. The project shows how sports data can be consumed in minimal interfaces and integrated into custom workflows or alerts.
items.summary_zh: Courtside 是一个面向终端的用户界面，用来展示实时 NBA 比分和统计信息，适合偏好命令行工具的用户。它为想要无需浏览器就能轻量、可脚本化获取比赛数据的球迷与开发者提供解决方案。该项目展示了如何在极简界面中消费体育数据并整合到自定义工作流或告警中。

items.title_en: Good type against all odds
items.title_zh: 在逆境中的优秀类型设计
items.summary_en: An essay praising robust type design that remains reliable under adversity, highlighting principles like safety, composability, and readability. It argues strong typing reduces bugs in complex systems.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章赞美在复杂系统中仍保持可靠的强类型设计，将安全性、可组合性与可读性作为核心原则，强调强类型能在困难条件下降低错误率。

items.title_en: Amber Tree: A Middle Ground Between Rowan Red and Green Trees
items.title_zh: Amber Tree：介于 Rowan Red 与 Green Trees 之间的中间树型
items.summary_en: Amber Tree presents a middle-ground concept between two tree-color representations, exploring implications for design choices, visualization, or data-structure aesthetics.
items.summary_zh: Amber Tree 提出介于 Rowan Red 与 Green Trees 之间的折中概念，探讨在设计、可视化或数据结构美学方面的取舍。文章分析了在性能、可读性与表达力之间实现平衡的途径。
